name: John Mbadi
notes: Key shareholder representative for all Kenyan SOEs. Oversees dividend policy, financial oversight, and government shareholder directions under the State Corporations Act.

engagements.subject: KPA FY2024 Performance Review and Dividend
engagements.attendees: KPA CEO, CFO, CS National Treasury, PS National Treasury
engagements.summary: Review of KPA FY2024 record performance and dividend remittance to government.
engagements.outcomes: Dividend of KES 2.9 billion approved. Berth expansion programme endorsed.
engagements.followUpActions: KPA to submit FY2025 performance contract by March 2025.

name: Kamau Thugge
notes: CBK regulates Kenya's banking sector and monetary policy. Key regulator for Kenya Development Bank. Forex policy impacts Kenya Airways and Kenya Power.

engagements.subject: KDB Annual Supervisory Review 2024
engagements.attendees: KDB CEO, CFO, CBK Governor, CBK Bank Supervision Director
engagements.summary: Annual supervisory review of KDB's financial performance, capital adequacy, and development mandate delivery.
engagements.outcomes: CBK noted KDB's strong capital position. Development mandate delivery acknowledged. NPL reduction plan required.
engagements.followUpActions: KDB to submit NPL reduction plan by January 2025.

name: Eng. Joseph Njoroge
notes: EPRA regulates electricity tariffs, licences, and quality of service. Critical regulator for Kenya Power. Tariff review and system loss targets require regular engagement.

engagements.subject: Kenya Power Tariff Review Application 2025
engagements.attendees: Kenya Power CEO, CFO, EPRA DG, EPRA Technical Director
engagements.summary: Kenya Power presented tariff review application requesting 15% average tariff adjustment for 2025.
engagements.outcomes: EPRA acknowledged Kenya Power's financial pressures; consumer impact assessment initiated.
engagements.followUpActions: Kenya Power to submit supplementary financial modelling; EPRA to hold public consultations.

name: Allan Kilavuka
notes: KQ CEO leading the airline's financial restructuring and strategic transformation. Key contact for debt restructuring negotiations and strategic partnership discussions.

engagements.subject: KQ Financial Restructuring — Government Shareholder Update
engagements.attendees: KQ CEO, CFO, CS National Treasury, PS National Treasury
engagements.summary: KQ CEO presented financial restructuring progress and lender negotiations update to government shareholder.
engagements.outcomes: Government committed to continued support for restructuring process. Strategic partnership options to be explored.
engagements.followUpActions: KQ to present strategic partnership options by March 2025.
